title: ctenitis dumrongii
intro: Ctenitis dumrongii, also known as Thai fir, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand and Myanmar. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis dumrongii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Ctenitis dumrongii can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
